# Dmitry Beskov CV

This is the static CV and blog for Dmitry Beskov. The CV is authored in MDX and rendered to static HTML for browsers, printing, and PDF generation.

- [CV](https://besdar.github.io/)
- [Blog](https://besdar.github.io/blog/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/besdar)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/besdar/)
